_comment: Bubble Analysis 2026-05-07 — patterns that reliably produce false positives

hash_terminators._comment: Cryptographic/one-way functions that destroy value identity. Any path passing through these cannot carry the original taint value to a sink.

phantom_junction_sinks._comment: DataObject::setData is called from many unrelated sites. Psalm merges them via positional parameter tracking, creating phantom paths. Any finding whose full hop chain passes through AbstractResource::setData -> DataObject::setData is likely a phantom junction.

non_rendering_sinks._comment: These sinks write to log files, profiler output (dev mode only), or error responses — not to browser-rendered HTML. Not actionable XSS sinks.

admin_write_sources._comment: Sources that require admin CMS/config write access. Anyone who can inject here has higher privilege already.
